cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Pull in all registered modules/drivers/apps as IDF extra components.
# Generated by modulestrap — re-run 'modulestrap build all' to update.
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../cattobaked/components_manifest.cmake
        OPTIONAL RESULT_VARIABLE _manifest_loaded)
if(NOT _manifest_loaded)
    message(WARNING
        "cattobaked/components_manifest.cmake not found — "
        "run 'python3 modulestrap/modulestrap.py build all' from repo root")
endif()

include($ENV{IDF_PATH}/tools/cmake/project.cmake)
project(purr_os)
